texto: What about my patterns of denial, you ask? Well, you will soon read that once I found myself in repose, in Bordirtoun, for an extended period, certain truths about my character began to assert themselves. Truths I had long ignored, and soon, I would find myself deeper, embedded. You will find that I am similarly skilled at this Pong-ian art of denial. After all, I was the one who came halfway around the world, assuming that my father was telling the truth, knowing full well that he was a world-class liar and cheat.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Leland Cheuk que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “What about my patterns of denial, you ask? Well, you will soon read that once I found myself in r…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fiction, about, com foco em termino e reflexao.
